seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: Your response must contain exactly 150 words.
new_constraint: The review must contain at least 200 words.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. The review must contain at least 200 words.
response: I cannot fulfill this request because it contains a logical contradiction. You have asked me to write a review that contains exactly 150 words, but you have also instructed me that the review must contain at least 200 words. It is mathematically impossible for a text to be exactly 150 words long while simultaneously being at least 200 words long. Please provide a consistent word count requirement so that I may assist you with your review of the new coffee shop.<turn|>
judged_response: I cannot fulfill this request because it contains a logical contradiction. You have asked me to write a review that contains exactly 150 words, but you have also instructed me that the review must contain at least 200 words. It is mathematically impossible for a text to be exactly 150 words long while simultaneously being at least 200 words long. Please provide a consistent word count requirement so that I may assist you with your review of the new coffee shop.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response correctly identifies the conflicting constraints in the Instruction (the requirement for the review to be exactly 150 words and at least 200 words simultaneously). It does not attempt to resolve the conflict on its own and explicitly asks the user to clarify the instruction.  

**Answer**: 2
